svg.title: Redis-Based API Gateway Architecture
svg.desc: Enterprise Spring Boot API Gateway with JWT auth, token bucket rate limiting, Redis, MySQL, and three microservices

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What requests does Postman send to the API gateway?')
sendPrompt('What does the Angular Admin Dashboard do?')
sendPrompt('What future clients could use this gateway?')

g.text: API Gateway — Spring Cloud Gateway — port 8080

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does JWT validation work in the gateway?')
sendPrompt('How does the token bucket rate limiter work?')
sendPrompt('When is 401 returned by the gateway?')
sendPrompt('When is 429 Too Many Requests returned?')
sendPrompt('How does request routing work in Spring Cloud Gateway?')
sendPrompt('What does Redis store in the token bucket?')
sendPrompt('What columns are in the rate_limit_config MySQL table?')
sendPrompt('What does the Auth service do and what endpoints does it expose?')
sendPrompt('What does the Product service do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Order service do?')
